title: Initialized Portfolio v2 Architecture

title: Cryptographic E-Signature Integration
description: Built secure, compliant PDF cryptographic signing systems utilizing Express, Node.js, pdf-lib, and Redis/Bull queue workers.

title: Intelligent CSV Importer Engine
description: Engineered SQL database caching managers and custom fuzzy-logic scoring algorithms to import and reconcile large sets of registrations.

title: Configured Platform Caching Models
description: Implemented redis caching layers reducing database query counts and overall API latency responses by 45%.

title: Twilio SMS Automation System
description: Configured automated Twilio reminder workflows, customized admin dashboards, and registered status-handling webhook controllers.

title: Released Headless Block Integration Engine
description: Authored custom React blocks that render CMS contents seamlessly in decoupled Next.js environments.

title: Automated Testing Pipeline Release
description: Designed continuous integration scripts using GitHub Actions, executing ESLint, Prettier, and TypeScript compilations.
